name.full: Microsoft Learn Research for Copilot Cowork

description.short: Research Microsoft documentation, compare services, and build learning plans
description.full: Extends Copilot Cowork with Microsoft Learn documentation research capabilities. Search official docs, compare Azure services, build structured learning plans, and get code samples — all through natural conversation. Powered by the official Microsoft Learn MCP Server.
